articles.title: Face à l’explosion de la musique IA, Qobuz prône la « curation humaine »
articles.description: Face à l'explosion des titres IA, Qobuz revendique une curation 100 % humaine et une tolérance zéro. Son directeur musique, Marc Zisman, détaille cette stratégie à BDM.

articles.title: Mais au fait, c’est quoi le Web Model Context Protocol (WebMCP) ?
articles.description: Développé par Google et Microsoft, le WebMCP permet aux sites web d'exposer des actions structurées aux agents IA. Décryptage.

articles.title: As workers worry about AI, Nvidia’s Jensen Huang says AI is ‘creating an enormous number of jobs’
articles.description: The Nvidia CEO seems to feel that claims of AI's job-killing potential have been greatly exaggerated.

articles.title: Geothermal startup Fervo Energy to raise up to $1.3B in IPO
articles.description: Enhanced geothermal startup Fervo Energy’s IPO could value the company at up to $6.5 billion.

articles.title: US government warns of severe CopyFail bug affecting major versions of Linux
articles.description: U.S. cybersecurity agency CISA says the CopyFail bug is being actively used in hacking campaigns, and poses a major risk to servers and data centers that rely on Linux.

articles.title: OpenAI’s cozy partner Cerebras is on track for a blockbuster IPO
articles.description: AI chip maker Cerebras is heading for a blockbuster IPO that could value it at $26.6 billion or more. Its relationship with OpenAI is deep and rich.

articles.title: Image AI models now drive app growth, beating chatbot upgrades
articles.description: Appfigures finds visual model launches generate 6.5x more downloads — but most don’t convert that spike into revenue.

articles.title: Katie Haun raises $1B for new venture funds
articles.description: Katie Haun announced on Monday that $1 billion has been raised across new funds to continue the firm’s thesis of backing crypto and blockchain startups.

articles.title: Hackers are mass-exploiting the cPanel bug to gain control of thousands of websites
articles.description: Days after the disclosure of a critical vulnerability in popular web hosting software cPanel and WHM, hackers are now targeting and hacking thousands of vulnerable websites.

articles.title: Elon Musk’s only AI expert witness at the OpenAI trial fears an AGI arms race
articles.description: Stuart Russell is a long-time AI researcher who thinks governments need to restrain frontier labs.

articles.title: Sierra raises $950M as the race to own enterprise AI gets serious
articles.description: The raise gives Sierra more than $1 billion to work with — capital the company says it will use to become the "global standard" for AI-powered customer experiences.

articles.title: Elon Musk sent ominous texts to Greg Brockman, Sam Altman after asking for a settlement, OpenAI claims
articles.description: Musk texted OpenAI's president and co-founder saying that he and CEO Sam Altman "will be the most hated men in America" if OpenAI doesn't settle the suit.

articles.title: Meet the Finalists: JetBrains x Codex Hackathon
articles.description: Put a capable coding model inside a developer’s primary workspace, and the IDE stops being a place where you write code. It becomes a place where you direct an agent, watch how it reasons, manage what it pays attention to, and decide when its output is worth shipping. That was the defining theme of…

articles.title: Anthropic and OpenAI are both launching joint ventures for enterprise AI services
articles.description: Both Anthropic and OpenAI have partnered with asset managers to more aggressively market their enterprise AI products.

articles.title: As X shuts down Communities, Acorn debuts an alternative that puts creators in control
articles.description: Acorn lets organizations build and run their own online communities using decentralized tech, with custom feeds, moderation, and analytics tools.

articles.title: US healthcare marketplaces shared citizenship and race data with ad tech giants
articles.description: Virginia and Washington, D.C. paused the data collection and sharing, after Bloomberg's investigation found their health insurance marketplaces were sharing users' information with advertisers.

articles.title: Amazon opens up its global logistics network to all businesses
articles.description: The new service, called Amazon Supply Chain Services, pits the e-commerce giant directly against UPS and FedEx.

articles.title: 5 days only: Bring a partner or colleague and get 50% off a second TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 pass
articles.description: The BOGO offer is live. For a limited time, buy one pass to TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 and get 50% off a second of the same ticket type. Offer ends this Friday, May 8. Save here.

articles.title: We Gave Agents IDE-Native Search Tools. They Got Faster and Cheaper.
articles.description: We ran the same coding tasks with and without prebundled tooling, across multiple models and languages. Here’s what changed. Eval-driven development IDE-native search reduced latency, cost, and budget overruns. The comparison below uses paired task-level deltas. Aggregate medians and totals are…

articles.title: Barocal can cool your food and drink by squeezing a hunk of plastic crystals
articles.description: Barocal might have discovered a cheap, nonpolluting material that could dethrone today's refrigeration technology.

articles.title: DoorDash adds AI tools to speed up merchant onboarding, edit photos of dishes
articles.description: DoorDash on Monday added new AI-powered tools that let merchants speed up onboarding, edit photos to make dishes look better, and create new websites from existing content.

articles.title: Novabricks : la plateforme No-Code « à la française » pour réconcilier les métiers et la DSI
articles.description: Novabricks est une plateforme "aPaaS" qui facilite la création d'applications métiers sans codage grâce au No-Code et Low-Code. Elle répond aux besoins numériques croissants des entreprises, aidant à surmonter les limitations des solutions traditionnelles. Novabricks permet ainsi une rapidité,…

articles.title: Symfony AI Mate : un troisième port d'entrée pour votre app Symfony
articles.description: Découvrez Symfony AI Mate, la solution innovante qui ouvre votre application Symfony aux agents via JSON-RPC sur stdio. Exposez vos services à des IDE ou chatbots en toute sécurité, sans port TCP ouvert. Simplifiez le développement avec cette approche unique.
articles.source: Le Code est dans le Pré

articles.title: Ouster’s new color lidar is coming to replace cameras
articles.description: A sensor that can simultaneously capture depth and image data has long been a "holy grail," Ouster CEO Angus Pacala told TechCrunch.

articles.title: GPT-5.5-Cyber, le nouveau modèle d’OpenAI qui rivalise avec Mythos
articles.description: Capable de détecter des vulnérabilités, d'analyser des malwares ou d'effectuer des pentests, GPT-5.5-Cyber s'annonce comme le pendant d'OpenAI à Mythos. Son déploiement restera, lui aussi, très encadré.

articles.title: Claude : 10 astuces pour économiser ses tokens
articles.description: Ces derniers mois, de nombreux utilisateurs se retrouvent bloqués avant la fin de leur session Claude, sans vraiment comprendre pourquoi. Voici quelques astuces pour optimiser vos tokens !

articles.title: Comment sécuriser votre compte ChatGPT
articles.description: OpenAI dévoile Advanced Account Security, un ensemble de protections renforcées pour les comptes ChatGPT, avec un partenariat inédit avec Yubico pour l'authentification par clé physique.

articles.title: Nicolas Sauvage is betting on the boring parts of AI
articles.description: The portfolio he has assembled since 2019 is dotted with technologies that have become more widely interesting to VCs over the last year.

articles.title: 5 formations en ligne pour créer et piloter une boutique en ligne
articles.description: Notre sélection de formations de la semaine est dédiée à celles et ceux qui souhaitent se lancer dans l'e-commerce, en créant leur boutique en ligne et en développant leurs ventes.

articles.title: Deux ans après son lancement, Le Chat rivalise-t-il avec ChatGPT ?
articles.description: Lancé en février 2024, Le Chat a suscité un certain enthousiasme en France, s'imposant comme une alternative crédible aux solutions américaines. Mais a-t-il, deux ans après, rattrapé une partie de son retard sur ChatGPT ? BDM a testé.

articles.title: We’ll take it: a TikToker rallies pledges to buy Spirit Airlines after its abrupt weekend collapse
articles.description: Within hours he'd thrown up a website — a janky, one-hour job, by his own admission — and by Sunday, 36,000 "founding patrons" had pledged nearly $23 million, crashing his servers in the process.

articles.title: ‘This is fine’ creator says AI startup stole his art
articles.description: The ad comes from Artisan, the AI startup behind billboards urging businesses to "stop hiring humans."

articles.title: In Harvard study, AI offered more accurate emergency room diagnoses than two human doctors
articles.description: A new study examines how large language models perform in a variety of medical contexts, including real emergency room cases — where at least one model seemed to be more accurate than human doctors.

articles.title: TechCrunch Mobility: How do you issue a ticket to a robotaxi?
articles.description: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility — your central hub for news and insights on the future of transportation.

articles.title: This tiny, magnetic e-reader could stop you from doomscrolling
articles.description: The Xteink X3 is a delightfully tiny, MagSafe-compatible e-ink reader that attaches to the back of your phone like a Pop Socket.

articles.title: AI-generated actors and scripts are now ineligible for Oscars
articles.description: Bad news for Tilly Norwood.

articles.title: Farewell, Jeeves: Ask.com shuts down
articles.description: Owner IAC says it's discontinuing its search business.

articles.title: Netflix delays Greta Gerwig’s ‘Narnia’ movie for big theatrical push in 2027
articles.description: "The Magician's Nephew" looks like a big next step in Netflix's thawing relationship with movie theaters.

articles.title: The best AI dictation apps, tested and ranked
articles.description: AI-powered dictation apps are useful for replying to emails, taking notes, and even coding through your voice

articles.title: Beyond Lovable and Mistral: 21 European startups to watch
articles.description: It is not that European startups never get attention — Lovable and Mistral AI are proof of that. But there are many more that insiders are tracking.

articles.title: Uber wants to turn its millions of drivers into a sensor grid for self-driving companies
articles.description: Praveen Neppalli Naga, Uber's chief technology officer, revealed the plan in an interview at TechCrunch's StrictlyVC event in San Francisco on Thursday night, describing it as a natural extension of a nascent program the company announced in late January called AV Labs.

articles.title: Kloak : injection de secrets en kernel-space via eBPF sur Kubernetes
articles.description: Comment Kloak intercepte le trafic TLS de vos pods au niveau kernel avec des uprobes eBPF pour injecter vos secrets de façon transparente, sans modifier vos applications ni déployer de sidecar.

articles.description: At TechCrunch's sold-out StrictlyVC event in San Francisco on Thursday night, we covered a lot of ground in a short time, beginning with the question everyone in the industry is asking right now: in a world where rival Cursor is reportedly in talks to be acquired by SpaceX for $60 billion, is…

articles.title: Musely secures $360M from General Catalyst without giving up equity
articles.description: The DTC skin, hair, and menopause care brand will use the non-dilutive capital to super-charge customer acquisition.

articles.title: Meta buys robotics startup to bolster its humanoid AI ambitions
articles.description: Meta bought humanoid startup Assured Robot Intelligence to beef up its AI models for robots, the company said.

articles.title: Se former à un nouveau langage à l'ère de l'IA
articles.description: C’est une habitude que j’ai depuis longtemps, je m’intéresse de manière plus ou moins assidue, chaque année à un langage de programmation autre que mon langage principal que j’utilise professionnellement. Ruby, Elixir, Rust, Go, Python ou encore Typescript. Cette année, ça sera C#. Mais à une…

articles.title: Coatue has a plan to buy up land for data centers, possibly for Anthropic
articles.description: Coatue, one of the biggest names in venture capital, has a new venture that is reportedly buying land near large power sources.

articles.title: Pentagon inks deals with Nvidia, Microsoft, and AWS to deploy AI on classified networks
articles.description: The deals come as the DOD has doubled down on diversifying its exposure to AI vendors in the wake of its controversial dispute with Anthropic over usage terms of its AI models.

articles.title: Ubuntu services hit by outages after DDoS attack
articles.description: A group of hacktivists have claimed responsibility for a distributed denial-of-service attack, which has affected several Ubuntu and Canonical websites, and prevented users from updating the Linux-based operating system.

articles.title: Musk v. Altman is just getting started
articles.description: Elon Musk spent the better part of three days on the witness stand this week in his lawsuit against OpenAI, and it’s already getting messy. articles.title: People are finally using Reddit’s search
articles.description: The company saw a 30% year-on-year jump in the number of people using search every week, CEO Steve Huffman said on Thursday.

articles.title: ChatGPT Images 2.0 is a hit in India, but not a big winner elsewhere, yet
articles.description: Users in India are embracing ChatGPT Images 2.0 for creative, personal visuals — from avatars to cinematic portraits.

articles.title: Jour 181 : Ce que j'ai appris avec un skill Claude pour du SEO
articles.description: Comment utiliser Claude-SEO pour auditer son site ? Test complet sur Writizzy : du JSON-LD aux headers de sécurité. Analyse des conseils de l'IA pour booster le trafic et résoudre les problèmes d'indexation.
